expectations.text: The main component is broken down into smaller, logical sub-components.
expectations.evidence: Extracted HeroBackground, HeroBadge, HeroContent, HeroStats, and ScrollIndicator sub-components into a 'hero' directory.

expectations.text: The refactored code uses clsx and tailwind-merge for class management.
expectations.evidence: Integrated the 'cn' utility (using tailwind-merge and clsx) for cleaner class management.

expectations.text: The component preserves all original sections (Badge, Title, Subtitle, CTA, Stats).
expectations.evidence: Maintained all original sections and visual behavior while improving the structure.
